acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Arm SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for SIG Arm focus on Kunpeng, Phytium and other Arm architecture hardware software ecosystem adoption.. The SIG has 9 core members and maintains 1 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Arm SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Arm SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Arm SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Arm SIG maintains 1 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Arm.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Arm SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Arm SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Gu Jian, Mao Hongbo, Shuai Jiakun. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
